• Show All Code
  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

Analysis: EPD Response Times

Harrison Hoback

2026-06-07

library(tidyverse)
library(stats)
library(ggplot2)
library(fixest)
library(broom)

Data Preparation

clean_data <- read.csv("cleaned_eug_spd.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    # Create a monthly date variable
    year_month = as.Date(year_month), 
    )
clean_data <- clean_data %>% 
  mutate(
    # Group priority levels into groups
    priority_group = case_when(
      priority %in% c(1, 2) ~ "emergency (1-2)",
      priority %in% c(3, 4) ~ "investigative (3-4)",
      priority == 5 ~ "service (5)",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_),
    # Define treatment and control group
    treatment = agency == "EPD",
    # Define treatment time period
    post_shutdown = ifelse(calltime > as.POSIXct("2025-04-05"), 1, 0)
    ) %>%
  filter(year_month < as.Date("2026-01-01"))
overall_did <- clean_data %>%
  # Group observations by month and treatment
  group_by(year_month, agency) %>%
  summarise(
    # Calculate average response time per year
    avg_response_time = mean(mins_to_arrv, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pt_overall <- overall_did  %>%
  filter(year_month < as.Date("2025-04-05")) %>%
  arrange(year_month) %>%
  mutate(year_month_num = as.numeric(year_month))
priority_did <- clean_data %>%
  # Group observations by month, treatment, and priority group
  group_by(year_month, agency, priority_group) %>%
  summarise(
    # Calculate average response time per group per year
    avg_response_time = mean(mins_to_arrv, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pt_priority <- priority_did %>%
  filter(year_month < as.Date("2025-04-05")) %>%
  arrange(year_month) %>%
  mutate(year_month_num = as.numeric(year_month))
x_min <- min(clean_data$year_month, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(clean_data$year_month, na.rm = TRUE)

common_theme <- list(
  scale_x_date(
    limits = c(x_min, x_max),
    date_breaks = "2 years" ,
    date_labels = "%Y"
  ),
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Average Response Time (Minutes)",
    color = "Agency"
  )
)

Analysis of Response Times

plot_overall <- ggplot(
  overall_did, 
       aes(
         x = year_month, 
         y = avg_response_time, 
         color = agency, 
         group = agency)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  ggtitle("Monthly Average of Police Response Times (2015–2025): Eugene vs Springfield") +
  common_theme +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = as.Date("2025-04-05"), color = "black", linetype = "dashed", size = 1
    )

plot_overall

# Create a dataframe of regression results
pt_model <- feols(
  avg_response_time ~ year_month_num * agency,
  data = pt_overall
)

summary(pt_model)
OLS estimation, Dep. Var.: avg_response_time
Observations: 248
Standard-errors: IID 
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
RMSE: 0.407669   Adj. R2: 0.935698
results_pt <- broom::tidy(pt_model)

results_pt
# Create a dataframe of regression results
did_model <- feols(
  mins_to_arrv ~ treatment * post_shutdown | agency + year_month,
  data = clean_data
)

summary(did_model)
OLS estimation, Dep. Var.: mins_to_arrv
Observations: 542,064
Fixed-effects: agency: 2,  year_month: 132
Standard-errors: IID 
... 1 variable was removed because of collinearity (treatmentTRUE)
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
RMSE: 14.1     Adj. R2: 0.011138
             Within R2: 6.242e-6
results_did <- broom::tidy(did_model)

results_did

Analysis of Response Times by Priority Group

# Plot average response times over time per priority group
pt_facet <- ggplot(
  pt_priority, 
       aes(
         x = year_month, 
         y = avg_response_time, 
         color = agency, 
         group = agency)
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Average Response Time (minutes)",
    color = "Agency"
  ) +
  ggtitle("Pre-Shutdown Monthly Response Time Trends: Eugene vs Springfield") +
  facet_wrap(~ priority_group)

pt_facet

# Create a dataframe of results for each priority group
results_pt_pg <- pt_priority %>%
  group_by(priority_group) %>%
  nest() %>%
  mutate(
    model = map(data, ~ feols(
      avg_response_time ~ year_month_num * agency, data = .x)
                ),
    tidy_model = map(model, tidy)
  ) %>%
  select(priority_group, tidy_model) %>%
  unnest(tidy_model)

results_pt_pg
# Create a dataframe of results for each priority group 
results_did_pg <- tibble(
  priority_group = c(
    "emergency (1-2)",
    "investigative (3-4)",
    "service (5)"
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    model = map(priority_group, ~ feols(
      mins_to_arrv ~ treatment * post_shutdown | agency + year_month,
        data = filter(clean_data, priority_group == .x)
      )
    ),
    tidy_model = map(model, tidy)
  ) %>%
  select(priority_group, tidy_model) %>%
  unnest(tidy_model)

results_did_pg
response_times_12 <- ggplot(
  filter(
    priority_did, 
    priority_group == "emergency (1-2)"), 
       aes(
         x = year_month, 
         y = avg_response_time, 
         color = agency, 
         group = agency)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  ggtitle("Monthly Response Times: Eugene vs Springfield (Priority 1-2)") +
  common_theme +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = as.Date("2025-04-05"), color = "black", linetype = "dashed", size = 1
    )

response_times_12

response_times_34 <- ggplot(
  filter(
    priority_did, 
    priority_group == "investigative (3-4)"), 
       aes(
         x = year_month, 
         y = avg_response_time, 
         color = agency, 
         group = agency)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  ggtitle("Monthly Response Times: Eugene vs Springfield (Priority 3-4)") +
  common_theme + 
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = as.Date("2025-04-05"), color = "black", linetype = "dashed", size = 1
    )

response_times_34

response_times_5 <- ggplot(
  filter(
    priority_did, 
    priority_group == "service (5)"), 
       aes(
         x = year_month, 
         y = avg_response_time, 
         color = agency, 
         group = agency)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  ggtitle("Monthly Response Times: Eugene vs Springfield (Priority 5)") +
  common_theme +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = as.Date("2025-04-05"), color = "black", linetype = "dashed", size = 1
    ) 

response_times_5

freq_pg <- ggplot(priority_did,
                  aes(x = year_month,
                      y = n,
                      fill = priority_group)) +
  geom_area() +
  facet_wrap(~agency) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Calls",
    fill = "Priority Group",
    title = "Call Priority Volume Composition Over Time"
  ) 

freq_pg

# Create output directories if they do not already exist
dir.create("figures", showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("results", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Export results to output directories
write.csv(results_pt, "results/results_pt.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(results_did, "results/results_did.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(results_pt_pg, "results/results_pt_pg.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(results_did_pg, "results/results_did_pg.csv", row.names = FALSE)

ggsave("plot_overall.png", path = "figures", plot_overall, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave("pt_facet.png", path = "figures", pt_facet, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave("response_times_12.png", path = "figures", response_times_12, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave("response_times_34.png", path = "figures", response_times_34, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave("response_times_5.png", path = "figures", response_times_5, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave("freq_pg.png", path = "figures", freq_pg, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
